name: Saneha Stories
original_name: เสน่หาสตอรี่
overview: The true stories of participants from Take Me Out Thailand are brought to life in a docu-drama format, combining a series-style narrative with real interviews of those who experienced the events firsthand. These are stories everyone should know, highlighting the importance of using their minds to navigate and fight for love.

trailers.title: [ตัวอย่าง EP.1] เสน่หาสตอรี่ | Saneha Stories - ตอน ปอ
